verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْبُرُوجِ
verses.text: By the sky full of constellations,
by the promised Day,
by a witness and what is witnessed!
May the companions of the Pit perish
– the Fire full of fuel –
when they are sitting over it,

verses.quran_arabic: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌۭ
verses.text: and they (themselves) are witnesses of what they have done to the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
verses.text: They took vengeance on them only because they believed in God, the Mighty, the Praiseworthy,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ شَهِيدٌ
verses.text: the One who – to Him (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. God is a witness over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
verses.text: Surely those who persecute the believing men and the believing women, (and) then have not turned (in repentance) – for them (there is) the punishment of Gehenna, and for them (there is) the punishment of the burning (Fire).

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّٰتٌۭ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
verses.text: Surely those who believe and do righteous deeds – for them (there are) Gardens through which rivers flow. That is the great triumph!
Surely your Lord’s attack is harsh indeed.
Surely He – He brings about (the creation) and restores (it).
He is the Forgiving, the Loving,
Holder of the throne, the Glorious,
Doer of what He intends.
Has the story of the forces come to you,
of Pharaoh and Thamūd?
No! But those who disbelieve persist in calling (it) a lie.
Yet God surrounds them from behind.
Yes! It is a glorious Qur’ān,
in a guarded Tablet.
